nodes.label: AI as administrative efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or inappropriate for core therapy
nodes.grounding_span: Composing email responses, summarising long emails, improving notes, setting up website

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for professional reflection
nodes.grounding_span: use it as a sounding board when I don't know where to take future sessions

nodes.label: AI honesty and error acknowledgment
nodes.grounding_span: utterly incapable of acknowledging when they make mistakes

nodes.label: AI memory and contextual consistency
nodes.label_negative: AI poor memory and forgetting details
nodes.grounding_span: AI's memory is shocking and it constantly forgets important details

nodes.label: AI capacity for authentic therapeutic relationship
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to replicate human empathy and challenge
nodes.grounding_span: AI will never be able to authentically replicate this

nodes.label: Confidentiality and ethical boundaries in AI use
nodes.grounding_span: unable to use AI for several aspects of my work due to confidentiality reasons

nodes.label: Professional efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: make them more concise, check for spelling errors

nodes.label: Authentic professional growth and self-awareness
nodes.grounding_span: talk through my own frustrations and feelings of being inadequate

nodes.label: Honest and accurate feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want or need an AI bot to suck up to me

nodes.label: Therapeutic integrity and human connection
nodes.grounding_span: Therapy at it's core is about human relation

nodes.label: Client confidentiality and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: breach of confidentiality to share this email

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for composing email responses, summarising long emails

nodes.label: Frustration with AI sycophancy and dishonesty
nodes.grounding_span: most AI models seem to have the tendency to be rather sycophantic

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing human therapy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't believe AI will ever be able to fully replace a human therapist

nodes.label: Cautious adherence to ethical boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: I cannot see a way where I could use them any more than I am already, without breaching a lot of ethical guidelines

nodes.label: Task-dependent interaction style switching
nodes.grounding_span: When it comes to summarising... I delegate... if I use it as a soundingboard... I prefer a more collaborative style

nodes.label: Ethical boundary setting based on vulnerability
nodes.grounding_span: it would feel wrong for me to discuss them
